title: Jiu Wudaishi: Old History of the Five Dynasties, Selection 6
description: From Jiu Wudaishi: Old History of the Five Dynasties: chapter 6
introduction: From Jiu Wudaishi: Old History of the Five Dynasties: chapter 6

translation.text: From Jiu Wudaishi: Old History of the Five Dynasties: A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
